summary: Comprehensive testing of BarberSaaS application completed. Backend APIs working excellently (95.2% success rate). Frontend registration and dashboard working after CORS fix. Public booking page functional.

minor_bugs.issue: PUT request returns empty response causing JSON parse error
minor_bugs.impact: Business hours update may not work properly in frontend

integration_issues.issue: Session expires quickly, redirecting users to login when accessing protected routes

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with all elements
Registration page form validation and submission
User registration creates account and barbershop successfully
Dashboard displays stats and layout correctly
Public booking page loads and shows appropriate messages
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix CORS configuration was successful. Minor issues: 1) Business hours PUT endpoint should return proper JSON response instead of empty response. 2) Frontend session management needs improvement to prevent quick session expiration on protected routes.
